description: General coding standards and conventions for the K3sForge project. Always apply.
applyTo: "**"

# K3sForge — Project Rules

## General

- **Never make assumptions.** If you are unsure about anything — intent, requirements, context, or implementation details — always ask before proceeding.
- **Always read `repo_context.md` at the start of each session.** On the first interaction in any session (or when re-entering the repo after a break), the agent must read the full `repo_context.md` file to understand the current repository context, structure, and policies. This should only be done once per session to avoid unnecessary slowdowns.
